items.annotation:
Test Execution Template with SetUp and TearDown logic.
This Test Execution Template has best practices in place, error handling and it attaches to a test case at runtime. The test case will run instead of the Placeholder part of the Execution Template.

Prepare to run the test:
- Prepare test data
- Prepare assets and configuration data
- Prepare the browser
- Prepare the AUT (Application Under Test)
Run the actual TestCase with the time constraint set by TestTimeOut

Final actions after the test.
- Bring the application in the original state
- Delete created test data
- Log out
- Save test results in other formats
- Check for application errors
